name: phase3-on-requirements-change
description: Update Phase 3 specs when requirements files change

action.message:
A Phase 3 requirements.md was just updated. Review the corresponding tasks.md and check:
1. Every new FR has at least one corresponding task
2. Every task references a specific FR number
3. Safety-critical FRs (vision timeout, abort handling, replan validation) have explicit tasks
4. Tasks are actionable and testable — not vague
5. No tasks reference Phase 2 behaviour that hasn't changed
Suggest any missing tasks.
